title: Clyde & Co’s conduct against partner “verges on bullying”: English court in dispute over bonus
description: The Commercial Court of the England and Wales High Court has refused relief to global law firm Clyde & Co LLP in a dispute with its partner Abhimanyu Jalan over bonus and remuneration, while observing that the firm’s conduct “verges on bullying.”Justice Michael Green declined Clyde’s application for an anti-suit injunction to restrain Jalan from pursuing proceedings before the Dubai Labour Court.The Court took note of Clyde’s correspondence threatening to withhold remuneration and terminate
